2026-03-25JUSOther Than Statutory AuthorityAppointment of a Judge of the Superior Court of Quebec for the District of MontréalAppointment of Stéphane Richer of the City of Montréal in the Province of Quebec, Barrister-at-law, to be a Judge of the Superior Court of Quebec for the District of Montréal, with residence in the territory of Ville de Montréal or in the immediate vicinity thereof.N/A
subject: Appointment of a Judge of the Superior Court of Quebec for the District of Montréal
precis: Appointment of Stéphane Richer of the City of Montréal in the Province of Quebec, Barrister-at-law, to be a Judge of the Superior Court of Quebec for the District of Montréal, with residence in the territory of Ville de Montréal or in the immediate vicinity thereof.
